description: Remove redundant attachment section from Daily Journal, extend editor to fill space, add /image slash command

userStories.title: Remove Attachment Section from Daily Journal Page
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a cleaner journal interface without the separate attachment section so that I have more space for writing and a simpler experience.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove AttachmentUpload component from daily journal page (both mobile and desktop layouts)
Remove AttachmentGallery component from daily journal page (both mobile and desktop layouts)
Remove attachment-related imports from the page
Remove onAttachmentDeleted callback and editorRef usage for gallery sync
Existing attachments remain in database (no data deletion)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: attachment section no longer visible
userStories.notes: Removed AttachmentUpload, AttachmentGallery, editorRef, handleAttachmentDeleted from page.tsx

userStories.title: Extend Editor to Fill Available Space
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the journal editor to use the full available height so that I have more writing space without scrolling.
acceptanceCriteria: Editor container uses flex-grow to fill remaining panel space
Editor maintains proper padding and styling
Works correctly in both mobile and desktop layouts
Resizable panel behavior preserved on desktop
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: editor fills available vertical space in right panel
userStories.notes: Added flex-1 and min-h-0 to page layout containers. Updated JournalEditor to use flex-1 with h-full on the editor element.

userStories.title: Add Image Slash Command to Editor
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to type /image in the editor to upload an image so that I can easily discover and use the image upload feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Image' option to existing slash command menu
Selecting /image triggers file picker dialog
Selected image uploads and inserts at cursor position
Uses existing handleImageUpload flow (blob preview → S3 upload → URL replacement)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: typing /image shows option, selecting it opens file picker

userStories.title: Clean Up Unused Attachment Sync Code in Editor
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove the unused removeImageByUrl method from the editor so that the codebase stays clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove removeImageByUrl method from JournalEditor component
Remove related useImperativeHandle ref export if no longer needed
Remove onAttachmentDeleted prop from editor interface
Update any TypeScript interfaces/types accordingly
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
